---
pagetitle: "Contact us"
---

::: grid
::: {#about_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Contact Us
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .text_block}
### Contact Us    

For inquiries regarding our programs, collaborations, or any additional information, please feel free to reach out to us via email at [admin@iscbiotrop.org](mailto:admin@iscbiotrop.org) or [oia.biology@ugm.ac.id](mailto:oia.biology@ugm.ac.id). Our team at the Office of International Affairs, Faculty of Biology, is happy to assist prospective participants, partners, and visitors with any questions you may have.

<small>
**[UNIVERSITAS GADJAH MADA](https://ugm.ac.id/)**  
**[Faculty of Biology](https://biologi.ugm.ac.id/en/)**  
Jalan Teknika Selatan, Sekip Utara  
Yogyakarta 55281, Indonesia  
</small>
:::

::: g-col-6
![](/img/field-sampling2.jpg){.img_block width="100%"}
:::
:::
